positive: A geometric minimalist pattern featuring stylized forest wildlife and celestial elements. Central focus is a majestic, abstracted stag silhouette jumping through a field of glowing bioluminescent flowers. Complementary elements include stylized crescent moons, geometric constellation glyphs, and branching mountain ranges, rendered in a neo-tribal, highly detailed linework style. Strong, vibrant contrast using jewel tones (sapphire blue, emerald green, royal purple) and accented with metallic gold leaf highlights. Composition must be balanced and central, ideal for a circular repeat pattern on apparel. High resolution, clean silhouette, graphic design print quality, smooth lines, flat color gradients, vector illustration.
